Pinyin

Loading Pinyin rulesвҖҰ

How to use

  • Type a syllable followed by 1, 2, 3, or 4 to add the tone mark
  • Place the caret on an existing syllable and press 1вҖ“4 to change its tone; 5 removes the mark (neutral tone)
  • Type v to enter Гј and V for Гң (type vv for a literal v)
  • Press Enter to accept the current syllable
  • Press Escape to cancel the current syllable
  • Backspace works normally
  • Check Pinyin underlines invalid syllables; turn it off when writing non-Pinyin text
  • A dotted underline marks an apostrophe hint, such as a missing apostrophe in hai'ou or an unnecessary one in ZhЕҚng'guГі
  • A teal underline marks a tone-sandhi hint вҖ” the syllable is pronounced with a different tone than written, such as nЗҗ hЗҺo (said nГӯ hЗҺo)
  • Tone colors tints each syllable by its tone
  • Your text is saved in this browser automatically; use Share link to copy a URL that carries your current text to someone else

Example: Type Ni3 hao3! Wo3 jiao4 Li3 Ming2, hen3 gao1xing4 ren4shi ni3. to get NЗҗ hЗҺo! WЗ’ jiГ o LЗҗ MГӯng, hДӣn gДҒoxГ¬ng rГЁnshi nЗҗ. ("Hello! My name is Li Ming, nice to meet you." вҖ” all four tones plus the neutral tone.)
